# AI Folders

> AI Folders is a free, open-source browser extension that organizes your AI conversations into custom folders and provides a reusable prompt library, available across ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, DeepSeek, Perplexity, and local LLMs.

AI Folders solves the problem of losing track of conversations across multiple AI chat services. Users can save, categorize, and retrieve any conversation from a unified side-panel, and inject saved prompts directly into any AI chat with a keyboard shortcut.

## Key features

- **Folder organization**: Save AI conversations from any supported service into named folders with custom emoji labels
- **Prompt library**: Store reusable prompts and inject them into any AI chat with one click or the `#PromptName` keyboard shortcut
- **Multi-service support**: Works with ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Copilot, DeepSeek, Perplexity, and self-hosted local LLMs (Open WebUI, LM Studio, etc.)
- **Cloud sync**: Conversations and prompts sync across devices via the browser's built-in sync
- **Mobile access**: Synced conversations appear in Chrome bookmarks, accessible on any phone
- **Tab groups**: Open an entire folder as a Chrome tab group in one click
- **Bulk actions**: Select, move, or delete multiple conversations at once
- **Drag and drop**: Reorder conversations and move them between folders
- **Right-click save**: Save any conversation via the browser context menu without opening the extension
- **Import / Export**: Full JSON backup and restore
- **43 languages**: Full UI localization including Arabic and Hebrew (RTL)
- **Open source**: MIT license, no telemetry, no account required

## Supported AI services

- ChatGPT (chat.openai.com)
- Claude (claude.ai)
- Gemini (gemini.google.com)
- Microsoft Copilot (copilot.microsoft.com)
- DeepSeek (chat.deepseek.com)
- Perplexity (perplexity.ai)
- Local LLMs: Open WebUI, LM Studio, and any configurable URL

## Install

- Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/ai-folders/kjmgfajofolnfeaahchpmkpecfimcppf
- Firefox Add-ons: https://addons.mozilla.org/firefox/addon/ai_folders/
- Source code: https://github.com/dlamarre-dev/AI-Gemini-Folders

## Also available

**Gemini Folders** — the single-site variant focused exclusively on Gemini conversations, with identical folder and prompt features.

- Chrome: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/gemini-folders/jffchdehoapigpmifkmleglfimjiilik
- Firefox: https://addons.mozilla.org/firefox/addon/gemini_folders/

## Technical details

- Built with vanilla JS and Chrome Extension Manifest V3
- Storage: Chrome sync storage with LZ-String compression (chunked to stay under quota)
- No external servers, no analytics, no account
- Permissions: storage, contextMenus, scripting, tabs (used only for injection on AI sites)
- Content scripts are injected only on supported AI domains

## Developer

David Fugère-Lamarre — https://github.com/dlamarre-dev
